generate_a_natural_language_answer_from_: Generate a natural-language answer from results
generate_query_variations_to_improve_rec: Generate query variations to improve recall
reorder_results_for_improved_relevance_u: Reorder results for improved relevance using LLM
search_across_your_synced_data_sources_u: Search across your synced data sources using Airweave. Supports semantic search with hybrid, neural, or keyword retrieval strategies. Optionally generate AI-powered answers from search results.
search_an_airweave_collection_across_syn: Search an Airweave collection across synced sources and answer a question with grounded, cited results.
search_an_airweave_collection_for_a_pers: Search an Airweave collection for a person, account, or project and compile a context brief from all sources.
search_results_with_content_and_metadata: Search results with content and metadata
